zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Prideaux II於1294年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Peter Reginald de Prideaux29歲，母親Claricia Pedes23歲。他於大約1263年與Joan Bigbury在英國英格蘭可瓦爾帕德斯托福結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1349年5月23日在他的家鄉享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Prideaux II于1294年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲Peter Reginald de Prideaux29岁，母亲Claricia Pedes23岁。他于大约1263年与Joan Bigbury在英国英格兰可瓦爾帕德斯托福结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1349年5月23日在他的家乡享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Prideaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish (Cornwall and Devon): habitational name from a place in the parish of Luxulyan, or perhaps the placename derives from the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Prideaux II was born in 1294, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Peter Reginald de Prideaux, was 29 and his mother, Claricia Pedes, was 23. He married Joan Bigbury about 1263, in Padstow, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 23 May 1349, in his hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Prideaux II est né en 1294, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Peter Reginald de Prideaux, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Claricia Pedes, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joan Bigbury environ 1263, à Padstow, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 mai 1349, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Prideaux II 1294 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter Reginald de Prideaux 29 und seine Mutter Claricia Pedes 23. Er hat um 1263 in Padstow, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Joan Bigbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Mai 1349 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Prideaux II è nato il nel 1294 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Peter Reginald de Prideaux, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Claricia Pedes, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Joan Bigbury circa 1263, nel Padstow, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 maggio 1349, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Prideaux IIが1294年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Peter Reginald de Prideauxは29歳，母Claricia Pedesは23歳であった。約1263年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルプアドストウでJoan Bigburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1349年5月23日に故郷で55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Prideaux II(이)가 1294년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Reginald de Prideaux(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Claricia Pedes(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1263년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 파드스타우에서 Joan Bigbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 5월 23일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Prideaux II nasceu em 1294, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Peter Reginald de Prideaux, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Claricia Pedes, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Bigbury aproximadamente 1263, em Padstow, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de maio de 1349, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Prideaux II родился в 1294 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Peter Reginald de Prideaux было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Claricia Pedes, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Bigbury около 1263 г. в местности падстоу, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 мая 1349 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Prideaux II nació en 1294, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Peter Reginald de Prideaux, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Claricia Pedes, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Joan Bigbury aproximadamente 1263, en Padstow, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de mayo de 1349, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años.
